title: Teltonika RUTC50 Industrial 5G Router
description: Teltonika RUTC50 is an robust industrial multi-network router that offers 5G mobile communication for high-speed and data-intensive applications. 5G mobile communication with the option of dual SIM configuration is combined with 5 Gigabit Ethernet ports and dual-band Wi-Fi 6 enabling reliable data transmission with ultra-low latency The power of 5G technology combined with a wide range of interfaces and industrial hardware features ensures adaptability for future upgrades and expansion of the entire system Compact size Powerful 5G / WiFi system Supports GNSS positioning RUTC50 is shipped with RutOS which provides advanced security features and specialized industry protocols for a wide range of professional application scenarios. It is fully compatible with Teltonika RMS remote management with the possibility of monitoring large groups of devices Combined router with variable connection Durable aluminum cover Supports 5G networks, MU-MIMO 802.11ax and gigabit ethernet RutOS operating system Interfaces: 5Ã 10/100/1000 Mbps (1Ã WAN, 4Ã LAN), 4Ã SMA for 5G, 3Ã RP-SMA for WiFi, 1Ã SMA for GNSS, 1Ã digital in, 1Ã digital out, 1Ã USB, 2Ã SIM slot (Mini SIM â 2FF) Notice: POE-IN support on LAN1 port is available from HW revision 0003, Batch number 007. If the POE-IN function is important for you, we recommend verifying the product version via email inquiry RUTC50 Router Power adapter 24V / 1A (4) 5G Mobile antennas (swivel, SMA male) (3) Wi-Fi antennas (magnetic mount, RP-SMA male, 1.5 m cable) GNSS antenna (adhesive, SMA male, 3 m cable) Patch cable SIM Adapter kit
